message:
feat(ui): upgrade hero cards, flywheel visualization, and TL;DR synergy diagram

Significant visual enhancements across 6 files:

app/page.tsx:
- Wrap hero project cards in motion.div with whileHover lift/scale
  animations and hover border color transitions for interactive depth

components/bento-grid.tsx:
- Switch from whileInView to always-visible animate for more reliable
  rendering; add explicit initial/animate/exit per grid item

components/flywheel-visualization.tsx:
- Add 7 new lucide icons (Cog, ShieldAlert, RefreshCw, etc.)
- Increase container from 420px to 520px, radius 150→200px
- Adjust node sizing (72→60px) and mobile scale (0.72→0.58)
- Tighten node styling with rounded-xl and refined icon/text sizing

components/tldr-synergy-diagram.tsx:
- Major rewrite with new SVG viewBox constants and useId for
  unique gradient/filter IDs preventing DOM collisions
- Add Zap icon import and restructured layout for better
  visual hierarchy

lib/colors.ts:
- Add 6 new color definitions for expanded palette support

lib/content.ts:
- Add 148 lines of new content data including flywheel tool
  descriptions and metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
